title: Tangy Crispy Portuguese Sweet Potatoes Crumble
description: This meal-prep-friendly dish features sweet potatoes coated in a tangy crumble and baked to crispy perfection, perfect for breakfast or dinner.

ingredients.name: 1 tbsp vegan butter or coconut oil

instructions: Rinse and dry the sweet potato.
Scrape out the insides of the sweet potato with a spoon, leaving about 1 inch unpeeled for easy handling.
In a mixing bowl, combine oats, flour, sugar, and salt. Stir in vegan butter or oil until well combined.
Add lime juice and optional lemon juice to the oat mixture. Mix thoroughly to evenly distribute flavors.
Coat sweet potato inside with half of the crumble mixture, ensuring it's evenly distributed and adhered to the insides.
Place coated sweet potatoes on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or sprayed with cooking spray. Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the outside is golden brown and crispy.
Let cool slightly before serving, ideally as part of a meal-prep routine.
